title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Amazon India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Amazon India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Amazon India Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a SEO Specialist at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amazon India Digital Technologies:
Amazon India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
